scripts.test: echo 'Use: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml -f infra/docker/docker-compose.test.yml run --rm test'
scripts.stack:migrate: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml exec -T api alembic upgrade head
scripts.stack:seed: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml exec -T api python -m researchos.seed.demo
scripts.stack:test: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml -f infra/docker/docker-compose.test.yml run --rm test
scripts.stack:full: pnpm stack:down && pnpm stack:up && pnpm stack:migrate && pnpm stack:seed
